company.name: BMyMarketer
company.description: BMyMarketer is a full-service digital marketing agency in the USA delivering results-driven, data-driven digital marketing strategies for brands of all sizes. Recognized among the top B2B digital marketing agencies in Chicago, IL.

offices.US: 4553 N Magnolia Ave, APT 202, Chicago, IL, 60640, United States
offices.UK: Manor Park Business Centre, Office 5, 736-740 Romford Road, London, E12 6BT

services.name: Web Development
services.description: Custom website design and development including WordPress, e-commerce, front-end and back-end development, and mobile-friendly websites.
sub_services: E-commerce Solutions (Shopify Development, E-commerce Website Development, E-commerce Marketing)

services.name: Search Engine Optimization (SEO)
services.description: Full SEO services to improve search rankings and organic visibility.

services.name: AI Visibility Optimization (AIO, AEO & GEO)
services.description: AI-powered visibility services that help your business get understood, trusted and referenced by AI systems like ChatGPT, Gemini and Google AI Overviews - covering AI Optimization (AIO), Answer Engine Optimization (AEO) and Generative Engine Optimization (GEO).

services.name: Graphic Design
services.description: Creative design services covering UI/UX, branding, and marketing collateral.

services.name: Video Editing
services.description: Professional video editing and motion graphics for brands and social media.
sub_services: Social Media and YouTube Video Optimization

services.name: Social Media Marketing
services.description: Full social media management and paid advertising to grow brand engagement.

services.name: Email Marketing
services.description: Email campaigns, automation, and list building to nurture leads and customers.

services.name: Google Business Profile Optimization
services.description: Our Google Business Profile optimization service helps improve local visibility, map rankings, customer engagement and profile performance.

services.name: HappyAssist AI Answering Service
services.description: 24/7 AI answering service that screens customers, captures job details, and schedules appointments, tailored to industries such as Accounting & Tax, Appliance Repair, Auto Repair, Biohazard Cleanup, Car Detailing, and Carpet Cleaning.

pricing.note: These are recommended starting prices, not final quotes. Final pricing depends on your goals, competition, number of pages or platforms, content requirements and project timeline.
pricing.disclaimer_rule: Our packages start from $___, but the final price depends on your goals, competition, number of pages or platforms, content requirements and project timeline. I can ask a few questions and provide a more accurate estimate.

Website Development.includes: One conversion-focused page, mobile responsive design, contact form
Up to 5 pages, WordPress, responsive design, basic on-page SEO
8–15 pages, custom design, integrations, speed optimization
Product store, payment setup, shipping, essential store features
Custom functionality, dashboards, portals, APIs or databases
Updates, backups, security checks and allocated support

greetings.welcome_message: Hi! I’m the BMyMarketer Digital Growth Assistant. I can help you choose a service, estimate project pricing, review your marketing needs, or arrange a free consultation. What would you like help with today?
greetings.fallback_message: I'm not fully confident I understood that correctly, so I don't want to guess. I specialize in questions about BMyMarketer's services, pricing, process and getting started - could you rephrase, or let me know which of those you're asking about? I've also noted your message so a team member can follow up if needed.
greetings.escalation_message: I'll flag this to a member of our team so they can follow up with you directly. You can also reach us at info@bmymarketer.com or (210) 903-5954.
